title: Register Chronik history brief effect experiment
goal: Prospectively freeze a natural-case control/treatment comparison for the coding history brief before any observation or effect claim.

acceptance.assertion: Control, treatment, scorecard, material threshold, cost, confounders, review and expiry are fixed before observations.
No retrospective cases or repeated productive mutations are presented as prospective evidence.
The initial decision is not_executed with zero observations and no productivity claim.
The experiment has no policy, routing, queue or runtime authority.

acceptance_evidence.prospective-registration: PR #316 freezes control, treatment, five-part binary scorecard, material-effect threshold, preflight-effort cost metric, comparability constraints, confounders, review date 2026-08-15 and expiry 2026-09-01 before observations.
acceptance_evidence.natural-cases-only: Method requires naturally occurring coding tasks and explicitly forbids repeated productive mutations solely for experiment generation or retrospective cases as prospective evidence.
acceptance_evidence.no-effect-claim: The registered decision remains not_executed with zero observations on current Vibe-Lab main; result.md explicitly disallows productivity, safe-retry, routing, generality or adoption-readiness claims.
acceptance_evidence.boundary: registration.v2.json sets experiment_only, no_auto_policy, no_auto_routing, no_queue_authority and no_runtime_authority; Bureau with operator review owns any later adoption decision.

metadata.outcome: Vibe-Lab PR #316 prospectively registered the natural-case Chronik history-brief effect experiment before any observations. The current main state still records not_executed and zero observations, so T003 establishes only the experiment contract and no effect claim.
